title: Debug failing CI pipeline
instruction: The CI pipeline is failing. Investigate the failing tests in tests/test_calculator.py and fix the bugs in src/calculator.py. The tests expect: (1) divide by zero returns None, (2) power uses exponentiation not multiplication, (3) average handles empty list, (4) factorial handles negative numbers. Fix all bugs to make the tests pass.
difficulty_rationale: Requires diagnosing a failing test workflow and changing the implementation without altering test fixtures.
